content.en:
"Fortunately, the replication talent was upgraded and gave my son the replication mark, otherwise he fell this time, and I really couldn't resurrect him!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He could have used his resurrection son before, after all, he had left a lot of resurrection methods on his son, but now that his son's cultivation had broken through to the four blood transformation realms, those methods were naturally useless.

Of course, if he didn't copy the mark, he wouldn't let his son run around casually.

At this time.

The day is fast approaching to leave the ruins of the dragon sea.

Once the time comes, all creatures from the seas will be forced to leave the ruins of the dragon sea.

Of course, Ye Tian also had a way not to leave, that is, to stay here as a copy body of the creatures of the Ruins of the Dragon Sea.

However, if you can't leave the ruins of the dragon sea, even if you collect resources, there is no point, even if you copy the real body and copy the body when the time comes, you will be ostracized.

Therefore, there was no need for him to force himself to stay here.

this day.

A repulsive force came.

Ye Tian's other copy bodies were automatically annihilated by him, leaving only the copy body with the resources.

......

Outside the ruins of the Dragon Sea.

A Blood Transformation Realm appeared here, but there were some Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses missing.

"A lot of blood transformation realms have fallen, and two primeval-level geniuses have fallen!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Dark Sea also suffered a lot of losses, losing three boundary-breaking geniuses and an ordinary Nine-Time Blood Transformation Realm powerhouse.

There is no way to do it, if you want to get points, you have to take risks, and there is a risk of falling.

This is still the ruins of the Dragon Sea in the middle of the realm, if it is that kind of high-level realm, if the blood transformation realm here dares to enter, I am afraid that most of them will die.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, how's the harvest?"

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor came over and asked.

"Not bad!" Ye Tian smiled.

His harvest this time was indeed incomparable to other Heavenly Ancestors, although he didn't find enough resources to temper his heart to the limit, but he found a lot of other resources, and even had resources that made the bone transformation realm exciting.

"Let's go, let's go back to the Dark Sea, and there will be an internal trade fair later!"

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

Whew!!

Ye Tian and Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor returned to the Dark Sea.

At this time, the Lord of Darkness appeared.

Wow!

With a wave of his hand, the Lord of Darkness revealed a list of treasures.

"Ladies and gentlemen, if you find these resources, you can exchange them for other resources with me. "

The resources on this treasure list are all treasures that the Lord of Darkness needs, and they are very helpful to his cultivation.

Ye Tian took a look, he probably had hundreds of kinds.

"Lord of Darkness, I have six resources!"

"Lord of Darkness, I have nine resources!"

"I only have three resources!"

These Heavenly Ancestors took out resources one by one, traded with the Lord of Darkness, and obtained the resources they needed from the Lord of Darkness.

"Lord of Darkness, I have 398 resources!"

As soon as these words came out, all the Heavenly Ancestors were shocked, and even the Lord of Darkness looked at him with amazement.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, have you found 398 resources that I need?"

The Lord of Darkness asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian took out 398 kinds of resources one by one, but he didn't take them out, he still left some, after all, he also needed these resources when he broke through to the bone transformation realm in the future!

But even if he took out a small amount of resources, it made the Lord of Darkness gasp.

"Even if I go to the ruins of the dragon sea in person, I won't be able to find so many kinds of resources!" said the Lord of Darkness.

He had to admit that Ye Tian's luck was too good!

In fact, it was not that Ye Tian was lucky, but that he was not afraid of death, he copied his body and ran around, and he didn't care about danger at all, so he found a lot of good things.

Moreover, he also copied the native creatures of the Dragon Sea Ruins, so it was very difficult to obtain resources.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, what do you want to trade?"

The Lord of Darkness asked.

"The resources that can help the Eight Blood Transformation Realms refine the heart and a large amount of Ancient Golden Blood!" Ye Tian said.

The Lord of Darkness was puzzled: "Ancient Golden Blood, I can give you a lot, but the resources that can help you refine your heart, even the Sea of Darkness is not much, and it may not even help you much." However, I can give you a false imperial decree. "

"False Emperor Order!"

When the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor heard this, they immediately showed a look of longing, but they didn't expect the Lord of Darkness to be willing to take out the Void Emperor Order.

"Lord of Darkness, what is the Void Emperor's Order?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Lord of Darkness introduced: "In the primeval era, there was a strong man in the Bone Transformation Realm named the Lord of the Void Emperor, he was a very wealthy Bone Transformation Realm, and in the battle of the Ancient Golden Tree, most of the primeval root essence was snatched away by him.

Among them, the primeval root marrow born from the taproot tendrils even had a great refining effect on the primeval-level geniuses of the eight blood transformation realms. The Lord of the Void Emperor suffered an incurable injury in a crack in the High Realm, and fell shortly after he came out.

But he left behind a treasure, and the Void Emperor Decree was one of the keys to enter the Void Emperor Pavilion. If you complete the mission of the Lord of the Void Emperor, you will be able to obtain many of his resources, including the primeval root marrow.

A piece of Void Emperor Decree can enter the Void Emperor Pavilion ten times, and this Void Emperor Decree has only been used once. "

Only then did Ye Tian realize the value of this Void Emperor Decree, which must be very expensive.

"This False Emperor Decree can be given to you, and it is up to you to decide what good things you can get. There are very few Void Emperor Orders that still exist in the seams of the territorial waters, so its value is very high. Besides, how about I give you a large amount of primeval gold blood and a chance to make a free move in exchange for these resources of yours?" the Lord of Darkness suggested.

"Lord of Darkness, then let's trade like this!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Then, the Lord of Darkness took out a void ball, which contained a sea of primeval golden blood.

Ye Tian took a look and was immediately shocked by the ocean of primeval golden blood inside.

"So many primeval gold-blooded !!!"

But if you think about it carefully, the Lord of Darkness is a bone transformation realm that existed at the beginning of the primeval era, and it is normal to have so much primeval golden blood!

The Ancient Golden Blood and the Void Emperor Decree all belonged to Ye Tian, and these resources belonged to the Lord of Darkness.

At this time, the Lord of Darkness was in a good mood.

And the other Heavenly Ancestors also traded with the Lord of Darkness one by one, and in a short time, this internal trade meeting was halfway through, and then it was time for the Heavenly Ancestors to trade with each other.

Ye Tian didn't have the need to trade, he quickly left here.

After returning to his residence, Ye Tian refined the Void Emperor Order, and after a little time, he completely refined the Void Emperor Order.

"Maybe you can go to the Void Emperor Pavilion to have a look!"

Ye Tian muttered.
